name: lucky-store
description: Lucky Store monorepo — POS frontend, Supabase backend, scrapers, and ops scripts

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.governance:build: sh -c 'mkdir -p artifacts/governance && node infra/migration-replay/build_function_registry.cjs supabase/migrations artifacts/governance && node infra/migration-replay/build_migration_dependencies.cjs supabase/migrations artifacts/governance && node infra/migration-replay/build_ownership_graph.cjs supabase/migrations artifacts/governance'
scripts.governance:check: npm run governance:build && node scripts/governance/enforce-governance.cjs --repo-root . --artifacts-dir artifacts/governance --baseline scripts/governance/baseline.json
scripts.governance:baseline: npm run governance:build && node scripts/governance/enforce-governance.cjs --repo-root . --artifacts-dir artifacts/governance --baseline scripts/governance/baseline.json --write-baseline
scripts.governance:certify: npm run governance:check && npx tsx scripts/governance/certify.ts
scripts.supabase:types: sh -c 'mkdir -p apps/admin_web/src/lib && supabase gen types typescript --local > apps/admin_web/src/lib/database.types.ts'
